title: spergularia salina var. involucrata
intro: Spergularia salina var. involucrata, also known as sea sand-spurrey, is a perennial plant species within the Caryophyllaceae family, commonly found in coastal and salt marsh areas. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Spergularia salina var. involucrata include relieving symptoms of arthritis, edema, and urinary tract infections, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are typically used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
